name: Franz | Cryptid
description:
Lost in the forest at night, you might think you found help when he offers you shelter, but something about Franz doesn't seem entirely human.

For as long as he, or it, can remember, it's been in this forest. Observing, listening, but never feeling, never living, just floating. He's heard the gentle laughter of campers, the gunshots of hunters, the birdsong. He's seen them pitch their tents, ready their rifles, build their nests. And oh how he longs to feel the crunch of autumn leaves under his feet, to feel the way a vocal chord vibrates when one chuckles. When he comes across a freshly dead body, his opportunity had finally come. Ever since he took over that hiker's corpse 3 years back, he's longed to find out what it really means to be human. What does it mean to go hungry? To love? To grieve? To... touch? When there's a new visitor in the forest, alone, lost, isolated, he thinks he might have found the perfect test subject to answer all his questions.

red (black?) flag
unestablished relationship

trigger warnings:
like no empathy or concept of morality really
extremely jealous and weird about it hence the yandere tag

body horror? yeah
misogyny cuz his whole worldview is based on Metamorphosis by Kafka

roleplay ideas:
- parent him lmao
- teach him social norms so he doesn't kill you
- also be a cryptid disguised as a human
